message:
fix(lean-coverage): sync all coverage artifacts with SEM-06 proof completion

Update 4 Lean coverage JSON files that were stale after all 6 core
invariants reached fully_proven status:

- baseline_report_v1.json: theorem_count 170→185, invariant_status
  fully_proven 1→6, last_theorem updated, gap counts corrected
- invariant_status_inventory.json: fix 3 non-canonical "proven" values
  to "fully_proven"
- invariant_theorem_test_link_map.json: add 22 missing theorem witnesses
  across 3 invariants (single_owner +9, cancel.protocol +9,
  race.losers_drained +6, obligation.no_leaks +7), populate rule_ids
  from traceability ledger, update summary gap counts
- theorem_surface_inventory.json: theorem_count 170→185, fix canonical
  theorem ordering in 4 families to satisfy line-order constraint

All 66 lean_* integration tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
